rulings.Case Title: DEVINE HARDY VS. ALYCE CARDINALE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Augment Expert Witness List And Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 17, 2018, Line 3. DEFENDANT ALYCE CARDINALE'S Motion For Leave To Augment Expert Witness List. GRANTED. Mr. Volk to be produced for deposition. Parties to meet and confer prior to hearing re: date of deposition to take place between September 18 and 21, 2018. Defendant to present order for execution at the hearing. Defendant is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to comply may result in motion being taken off calendar. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: K5 FAMILY LLC VS. MAIRE DAWN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 17, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANTS DEREK SIMMONS, JARRED NEWMAN, MAIRE DWAN, UCHE NCHEKWUBE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. The premises are sufficiently specified in bold font in the Notice. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer under CCP 1161a against former trustor and any person claiming under Trustor. Complaint does not and cannot legally demand possession from tenants (as operative Notice is not compliant with CCP 1161b and/or SFRO). Therefore, any claims of tenancy and protections afforded to tenants cannot be properly addressed on a demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WARREN CHEW ET AL VS. BLAKE PERSICK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 17, 2018, Line 7. DEFENDANT BLAKE PERSICK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Service of operative Notice is sufficiently alleged. =(501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 17, 2018, Line 8. DEFENDANT COLLEEN BOND'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant failed to cite any authority for the proposition that Form 1007 was required to be attached under the circumstances of this case. Specifically allegations re: SFRO 37.9(b). =(501/REQ)
